SEARCH

Uses of Class
common.dto.ReservationDTO

Packages that use ReservationDTO
Package
Description
client.view
Client JavaFX controllers and view helpers — one controller per FXML screen (login, dashboard, reservations, gate, reports, approval queue, notifications, registration, …) plus shared UI utilities such as BaseController and Widgets.
common.dto
Serializable data transfer objects and enums shared by client and server.
server.dao
Data access layer: one DAO per aggregate (auth, members, parks, reservations, visits, waiting list, notifications, reports, parameter-change requests).

  • Uses of ReservationDTO in client.view

    Fields in client.view declared as ReservationDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final ReservationDTO
    ReservationListController.EditFlow.original
    The reservation being edited (the original, pre-change values).
    Methods in client.view that return types with arguments of type ReservationDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private List<ReservationDTO>
    DashboardController.reservationsFrom(ServerResponse res)
    Extracts the reservation list from a LIST_RESERVATIONS response.
    Methods in client.view with parameters of type ReservationDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private HBox
    ReservationListController.dataRow(ReservationDTO r, boolean withDivider)
    Builds one reservation row: info cells, status tag, and the action buttons.
    private void
    ReservationListController.edit(ReservationDTO r)
    Launches the on-screen edit flow for one reservation, replacing the old popup dialog: a three-step wizard — Edit Details → Review → Settlement — with a step indicator, rendered in place of the list.
    private VBox
    DashboardController.nextVisitCard(ReservationDTO next, LocalDate nextDate, Map<Integer,String> parkNames)
    Builds the "next visit" card, or an empty-state card when there is none.
    private void
    ReservationCreateController.showConfirmation(ReservationDTO created)
    Renders the payment confirmation for a freshly booked reservation from the server's ReservationDTO: reservation number, the server-computed total (price in cents formatted as shekels), and whether it was paid in advance or is due on arrival.
    private void
    ReservationListController.showDetail(ReservationDTO r)
    Opens a small read-only detail of one reservation: every field the row hints at, spelled out — date, time, party, type, status, price, payment, guide and confirmation code.
    Method parameters in client.view with type arguments of type ReservationDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    ReservationListController.populate(List<ReservationDTO> rows)
    Renders the header and one row per reservation (or an empty-state row).
    private void
    ReservationListController.resubscribe(List<ReservationDTO> rows)
    Points this screen's realtime subscriptions at exactly the reservation ids currently displayed.
    Constructors in client.view with parameters of type ReservationDTO
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
    (package private)
    EditFlow(ReservationDTO r)
    Creates the wizard for one reservation, snapshotting the current view.

  • Uses of ReservationDTO in server.dao

    Methods in server.dao that return ReservationDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ReservationDTO
    ReservationDAO.findByConfirmationCode(int confirmationCode)
    Looks up a single reservation by its booking confirmation code — the lookup the gate performs at entry, where the visitor presents the code printed on their booking.
    ReservationDTO
    ReservationDAO.getById(int id)
    Looks up a single reservation by its primary key.
    private ReservationDTO
    ReservationDAO.map(ResultSet rs)
    Maps the current row of a ResultSet to a ReservationDTO.
    Methods in server.dao that return types with arguments of type ReservationDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<ReservationDTO>
    ReservationDAO.findByVisitor(long visitorId)
    Lists every reservation owned by a visitor, most recent visit first.
    List<ReservationDTO>
    ReservationDAO.findConfirmTimeoutCandidates(int timeoutMinutes)
    Finds the PENDING reservations whose confirmation window has lapsed: still PENDING, already reminded (reminder_sent_at IS NOT NULL), and reminded more than timeoutMinutes ago.
    List<ReservationDTO>
    ReservationDAO.findConfirmTimeoutCandidates(int timeoutMinutes, boolean force)
    Force-aware variant of ReservationDAO.findConfirmTimeoutCandidates(int).
    List<ReservationDTO>
    ReservationDAO.findNoShowCandidates()
    Finds the reservations that the no-show sweep should mark ReservationStatus.NO_SHOW: those still CONFIRMED whose visit_date is strictly before today (a same-day booking can still arrive) and for which no visit row was ever recorded — i.e.
    List<ReservationDTO>
    ReservationDAO.findNoShowCandidates(boolean force)
    Force-aware variant of ReservationDAO.findNoShowCandidates().
    List<ReservationDTO>
    ReservationDAO.findReminderCandidates(int leadHours)
    Finds the PENDING reservations due a confirmation reminder: those whose visit (combining visit_date with visit_time, or midnight when the time is null) falls between now and leadHours from now, and that have not already been reminded (reminder_sent_at IS NULL).
    List<ReservationDTO>
    ReservationDAO.findReminderCandidates(int leadHours, boolean force)
    Force-aware variant of ReservationDAO.findReminderCandidates(int).
    Methods in server.dao with parameters of type ReservationDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    ReservationDAO.insert(ReservationDTO r)
    Inserts a new reservation, letting the database assign the auto-increment id.
